title: C001: Keystone Container Image & Release Config
description:
**Size:** 🔨 medium
**Category:** infrastructure
**Priority:** high
**Feature ID:** S006

## Summary

Implement the container image build infrastructure for Keystone. This creates three Dockerfiles (`python-base`, `venv-builder`, `keystone`) following the multi-stage build pattern from `architecture/docs/08-container-images/`, the release configuration for OpenStack 2025.2 (`source-refs.yaml`, `upper-constraints.txt`, `extra-packages.yaml`), the constraint override script, and verifies the Keystone image builds successfully with `keystone-manage --version`.

## Scope

**Included:**
- `images/python-base/Dockerfile` — Ubuntu Noble base with Python 3.12, runtime libs, PATH, generic `openstack` service user UID/GID 42424, non-root
- `images/venv-builder/Dockerfile` — Build dependencies, `uv` (pinned via `COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:0.6.3`), virtualenv at `/var/lib/openstack/`, common base packages
- `images/keystone/Dockerfile` — Multi-stage build: Stage 1 (`venv-builder`) installs Keystone via `uv pip install` with `--constraint` and extras from `extra-packages.yaml`; Stage 2 (`python-base`) copies venv, adds Keystone runtime system packages. Source and constraints passed as named build contexts (`--build-context`)
- `releases/2025.2/source-refs.yaml` — Git refs for Keystone (initially `keystone: "28.0.0"`)
- `releases/2025.2/upper-constraints.txt` — Python dependency pins committed from OpenStack `stable/2025.2` branch
- `releases/2025.2/extra-packages.yaml` — Combined per-service Python extras and apt runtime packages
- `scripts/apply-constraint-overrides.sh` — Merges `overrides/<release>/constraints.txt` into `upper-constraints.txt`
- Local image build verification: `docker build` succeeds, `keystone-manage --version` runs
- Remove `.gitkeep` from `images/` and `releases/` (no longer needed)

**Excluded:**
- GitHub Actions CI workflow for image builds (S007)
- Multi-arch support (S007)
- GHCR push and tag schema (S007)
- Other service Dockerfiles (nova, neutron, glance, cinder, placement) — Keystone-first strategy
- `patches/` directory structure — no patches needed yet
- `overrides/` directory with actual constraint override files — script handles the logic; files added when needed
- SBOM generation and signing (documented in `architecture/docs/08-container-images/04-sbom.md`)
- Makefile `docker-build` target implementation (follow-up or part of S007)

## Resolved Decisions

1. **Service user**: Generic `openstack` user/group (UID/GID 42424) created in `python-base`. All service images inherit via `USER openstack`. This is a **deviation** from the architecture doc's Keystone Dockerfile example which creates a per-service `keystone` user — the deviation should be documented with a `# DEVIATION` comment.

2. **`extra-packages.yaml` format**: Combined schema with both Python extras and apt runtime packages per service:
   ```yaml
   keystone:
     pip_packages:
       - "keystone[ldap]"
       - "keystone[memcache_pool]"
       - "keystone[oauth1]"
     apt_packages:
       - libapache2-mod-wsgi-py3
       - libldap-2.5-0
       - libsasl2-2
       - libxml2
   ```

3. **`upper-constraints.txt`**: Committed in the repo at `releases/2025.2/upper-constraints.txt`, sourced from OpenStack's `requirements` repo `stable/2025.2` branch. Renovate can track updates.

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph BaseImages["Base Images"]
        UB["ubuntu:noble"]
        PB["images/python-base/Dockerfile"]
        VB["images/venv-builder/Dockerfile"]
        UB --> PB
        PB --> VB
    end

    subgraph ReleaseConfig["releases/2025.2/"]
        SR["source-refs.yaml"]
        UC["upper-constraints.txt"]
        EP["extra-packages.yaml"]
    end

    subgraph Scripts["scripts/"]
        AO["apply-constraint-overrides.sh"]
    end

    subgraph KeystoneBuild["images/keystone/Dockerfile"]
        S1["Stage 1: FROM venv-builder AS build"]
        S2["Stage 2: FROM python-base"]
        S1 -->|"COPY --from=build --link /var/lib/openstack"| S2
    end

    VB --> S1
    PB --> S2
    UC -->|"--constraint via named build context"| S1
    EP -->|"pip extras + apt packages"| S1
    SR -->|"git ref for CI checkout"| S1
    AO -->|"merges overrides into"| UC

    S2 --> VERIFY["keystone-manage --version"]
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Dev as Developer
    participant Docker as Docker Build
    participant PB as python-base
    participant VB as venv-builder
    participant KS as keystone Stage 1
    participant RT as keystone Stage 2

    Dev->>Docker: docker build images/python-base
    Docker->>PB: FROM ubuntu:noble + Python 3.12 + runtime libs + openstack user 42424
    Dev->>Docker: docker build images/venv-builder
    Docker->>VB: FROM python-base + uv 0.6.3 + build-essential + venv
    Dev->>Docker: docker build images/keystone --build-context keystone=src/ --build-context upper-constraints=releases/2025.2/
    Docker->>KS: FROM venv-builder AS build + bind-mount source + uv pip install
    KS-->>RT: COPY --from=build --link /var/lib/openstack
    Docker->>RT: FROM python-base + apt runtime packages + USER openstack
    Dev->>RT: keystone-manage --version
    RT-->>Dev: 28.0.0
```

## Key Components

- **`images/python-base/Dockerfile`**: Ubuntu Noble 24.04 LTS runtime base. Installs `ca-certificates`, `netbase`, `python3`, `sudo`, `tzdata`. Sets `ENV PATH=/var/lib/openstack/bin:$PATH`, `ENV LANG=C.UTF-8`. Creates generic `openstack` user/group (UID/GID 42424). All service images inherit from this. SPDX header required.

- **`images/venv-builder/Dockerfile`**: Build-time image extending `python-base`. Adds `build-essential`, `git`, `libffi-dev`, `libpq-dev`, `libssl-dev`, `python3-dev`, `python3-venv`. Copies `uv` binary from `ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:0.6.3`. Creates virtualenv at `/var/lib/openstack`. Pre-installs common packages (`cryptography`, `pymysql`, `python-memcached`, `uwsgi`) with constraints. SPDX header required.

- **`images/keystone/Dockerfile`**: Multi-stage build, release-independent. Stage 1 (`FROM venv-builder AS build`): bind-mounts Keystone source and `upper-constraints.txt` via `--mount=type=bind,from=<context>`, runs `uv pip install --constraint` with extras from `extra-packages.yaml`. Stage 2 (`FROM python-base`): `COPY --from=build --link /var/lib/openstack /var/lib/openstack`, installs Keystone-specific runtime apt packages (`libapache2-mod-wsgi-py3`, `libldap-2.5-0`, `libsasl2-2`, `libxml2`), sets `USER openstack`. SPDX header required. Includes `# DEVIATION` comment explaining generic user vs per-service user.

- **`releases/2025.2/source-refs.yaml`**: YAML mapping component names to git refs. Initially `keystone: "28.0.0"`. Single source of truth for what version is built per release. Renovate tracks updates via custom regex manager.

- **`releases/2025.2/upper-constraints.txt`**: Pinned Python dependency versions from OpenStack `requirements` repo, `stable/2025.2` branch. ~500 lines. Ensures reproducible builds.

- **`releases/2025.2/extra-packages.yaml`**: Per-service map with two sections: `pip_packages` (Python extras/packages to install alongside the service) and `apt_packages` (runtime system packages for the final image). Initially populated for Keystone only.

- **`scripts/apply-constraint-overrides.sh`**: Bash script reading `overrides/<release>/constraints.txt` and applying line-by-line overrides to `upper-constraints.txt`. Supports version replacement (`cryptography===44.0.1`) and package removal (`-oslo.messaging`). Idempotent — no-op when override file doesn't exist. SPDX header required.
